since_last: 12% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.30%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 12% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -1.91% · Gold -1.57% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 12% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.30%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.30%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.67%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +8.29%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +8.29%, BIDU +4.37%, AVAV +2.07%, CHKP +1.31%, SPCX +1.19%. Laggards: MGNI -4.14%, RXRX -3.65%, MU -3.51%, INOD -3.42%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.19% at $151.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.19% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
